build.beforeDevCommand: rm -rf web-dist && mkdir -p web-dist/vendor && cp index.html styles.css app.js web-dist/ && cp node_modules/lucide/dist/umd/lucide.min.js web-dist/vendor/
build.beforeBuildCommand: rm -rf web-dist && mkdir -p web-dist/vendor && cp index.html styles.css app.js web-dist/ && cp node_modules/lucide/dist/umd/lucide.min.js web-dist/vendor/
